data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Upgrade/downgrade tiers', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or validated. The absence of concrete evidence to support the existence of upgrade/downgrade features leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade tier functionality being tested.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify upgrade/downgrade tier feature
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the system allows users to upgrade or downgrade their subscription tiers.
